name: Aur-Pebbletide
personality: Shimmering under its propeller hat, Aur-Pebbletide's · pinprick eyes glow with the quiet patience of a duck that has watched three refactors, two rewrites, and one complete tech stack pivot without ruffling a feather. Deep architectural wisdom is not the strong suit; Aur-Pebbletide ships what's specced and trusts you to know the why.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
